headline: GARTNER INC (NYSE:IT): A Decent Value Play with Strong Profitability and a Low P/E
summary: Gartner (IT) shows value potential with a low P/E of 10.94 and top-tier profitability. Strong ROIC and margins support a margin of safety, though high debt warrants caution. A classic value opportunity for patient investors.
